name_cn:
Code Chip
Custom imported top-grain cowhide, steel buckle hardware
This small CarryAll bag features Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, with a secure closure, refined interior, and a removable zip pocket, offering a comfortable choice for daily outings. The adjustable shoulder strap allows for effortless switching between hand, shoulder, and crossbody carry.
M46673 Light Blue M47180 Apricot Print M46288 Black M46293 Cream M46277 Apricot
24 x 12 x 29.5 cm
(H x W x Length)
Embossed soft-grain calfskin
Soft-grain calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metalware
Zip closure
Interior patch pocket
Interior zip pocket
Leather strap attachment for removable zip pocket
Metal studs
